title: HSEOS Agent Core Manifest
description: Schema for .agents/manifest.yaml. Supports v1.0 (current) and v2.0 (per ADR-0007). v2.0 adds schema_version, mcp_bundles_active, plugins, signatures, and per-adapter sha256/capabilities. v1.0 manifests remain valid; v2.0 fields are optional during the transition window.

version.description: Manifest format version. Use '1.0' for current compiler output, '2.0' once the compiler v2 (ADR-0007) lands.

schema_version.description: Optional schema version identifier introduced in v2.0. When present, signals the compiler v2 contract (multi-adapter, hash-pinned integrity, BYOA).

generated_by.description: Identifier of the compiler that produced this manifest.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the manifest was emitted (v2.0 only).

source_of_truth.description: Project-relative path to the canonical source directory.

integrity_root.description: Project-relative path to the directory holding per-adapter sha256 signatures (v2.0 only).

adapters.description: Adapter targets. v1.0 uses an object keyed by adapter id. v2.0 uses an array of adapter records with explicit id, enabled, output, capabilities, sha256.

oneOf.description: v1.0 form: object keyed by adapter id.
v2.0 form: array of adapter records with declarative spec references.

spec.description: Project-relative path to the adapter spec yaml (e.g. .agents/adapters/<id>.yaml).

output.description: Map of output type -> path produced by the adapter.

capabilities.description: Capability tags the adapter supports (hooks, subagents, slash_commands, mcp_stdio, statusline, settings, etc.).

sha256.description: Hash of the emitted bundle for drift detection.

platforms.description: v1.0 legacy field: list of platform shorthands. v2.0 supersedes this with adapters[].id.

mcp_bundles_active.description: Active MCP bundles (v2.0, per ADR-0008). Bundles are defined in .agents/mcp/bundles/<name>.yaml.

mcp_servers.description: Enumerated MCP servers active under the selected bundles (v2.0).

plugins.description: Installed plugins from the HSEOS marketplace (v2.0, per ADR-0009).

counts.description: Quick-reference counts of the compiled assets.

agents.description: v2.0 only: catalog of HSEOS agents emitted as adapter-specific subagents.

rendered.description: Map of adapter id -> emitted subagent file path.
